name: cms-delivery-workflow
description: Machine-readable CMS delivery workflow definition — output file generation, packaging, and deployment preparation.

steps.name: Read CMS Data
steps.description: Read all CMS tables to assemble data for output files

steps.name: Generate Website Manifest
steps.description: Generate website-manifest.json with pages, brands, collections, categories, blog posts

steps.name: Generate Search Index Output
steps.description: Generate search-index.json with all indexed entities and keywords

steps.name: Generate Navigation Output
steps.description: Generate navigation.json with hierarchical main nav and footer nav

steps.name: Generate Sitemap Output
steps.description: Generate sitemap.xml and sitemap.json with URL priority scoring

steps.name: Package Delivery
steps.description: Verify all output files are written, compute delivery metrics
